env_improvement_1: Hard mode (tight budget, consequential decisions) — NOW THE CANONICAL DEFAULT. This records the before/after that justified promotion.
verdict: Promoting hard mode to canonical turns the oracle from uninformative where decisions matter (Spearman vs realized return -0.005) to genuinely informative (+0.373); decision-relevant groups 0.20->0.49 (2.4x). masked goal_rate is now 0.667 (meaningful, no longer saturated at 1.0).
